station_address: Survey No 8, DP Road, 120 Ft Road, Wadala - Chembur Rd, opposite Bhakti Park, Phase 1, Wadala Truck Terminal, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400037
text:
Place is not maintained and staff don't have any sense of talking.
The petrol is also not accurate, if you wishes to refill so either go for full tank, but dint try to refill small quantity. They will surely have some rigged pumps. Force you to refill from that particular pump.

Better avoid it if you want to refill your car with accurate amount and price.

station_address: Survey No 8, DP Road, 120 Ft Road, Wadala - Chembur Rd, opposite Bhakti Park, Phase 1, Wadala Truck Terminal, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400037
text: Good quality fuel. Always feel that my Avenger seems to run smoother after a refill from here. A little inside from the main road and mostly a waiting time, but for me its worth it. Also has a CNG option. Tyre services are always out of order.
